meta.description: An external integration used by a pipeline.

contributes.description: What it contributes to the pipeline.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_1280bb4f_7094_4116_82cd_82f88d9af432" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "contributes" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_1280bb4f_7094_4116_82cd_82f88d9af432" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_1280bb4f70944116_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
